head  
The representative plans to distribute 250 brochures, each highlighting 5 applications of dark matter. They print an additional batch, which is 3 times the original amount. The total number of brochures printed is 250 + (250 × 3) = 250 + 750 = 1000 brochures. Each brochure highlights 5 applications, so the total number of applications is 1000 × 5 = 5000 applications. The final word is head.
